description: Cultural contrast glyph for cross-cultural pattern comparison. Maps how different cultural lenses interpret the same underlying phenomenon, anchored to Rosetta shapes as culture-invariant reference frames.

contrast_pairs.invariant_reason: Both poles encode the same 3-bit state space — the encoding is universal, the interpretation varies.
Icosahedral families accommodate both linear and cyclical dynamics — 20 faces tile both.
Dodecahedral principles transcend expression mode — wisdom exists before words.

audit_rule.description: Any AI system must be auditable across cultural contexts. A conclusion that only holds in one cultural frame is incomplete.
audit_rule.constraint: Cultural contrast scores must be computed for all output claims before release.
